author: John
description: Personal political and geopolitical market-bias overlay. This is my own opinion, not a system inference or investment advice.

views.title: US-China tariff trajectory
views.body: Escalating tariff rhetoric likely to weigh on semiconductor supply chains and consumer electronics margins through H2 2026. Watch for CHIPS Act beneficiaries vs. Taiwan-exposed names.

views.title: Fed rate path sensitivity
views.body: Sticky services inflation keeps the Fed on hold longer than consensus expects. Rate-sensitive sectors (regional banks, REITs, long-duration growth) remain vulnerable to upside CPI surprises.

views.title: AI capex supercycle vs. demand realisation
views.body: Hyperscaler capex guidance is supportive near-term for infrastructure names, but monetisation of enterprise AI remains uncertain. Risk of multiple compression if AI revenue ramp disappoints.
